reference: Hello dear, you are correct. It is a fungal infection only, so do not worry too much. Here are my suggestions: take one tablet of fluconazole one hundred and fifty milligrams as a single dose. Apply clotrimazole ointment twice daily for one month. The most important point is that you must apply this ointment for one month even after the cure; otherwise, there will be a recurrence. I hope you get well soon. Thank you.
text: Hello, dear. You are correct. It is a fungal infection only, so do not worry too much. Here are my suggestions: take one tablet of fluconazole, one hundred and fifty milligrams, as a single dose. Apply clotrimazole ointment twice daily for one month. The most important point is that you must apply this ointment for one month even after the cure, otherwise there will be a recurrence. I hope you get well soon. Thank you.
